query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'unsubscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unsubscribed FROM subscribers;
